subcodes.first_line: O blessed household! From the very dawn of the Morn of Truth ye were attracted to the manifest light and turned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خاندان مبارک آنخانواده از بدو طلوع صبح حقیقت منجذب نور مبین گشتند و توجه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @eulogies; reminiscences, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
